results.why: This pass tightens [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] around smoother four-color mana, cleaner color-identity compliance, and a more focused proliferate plan. The land swaps add better fixing and fetch support while trimming slower basics and budget fixers. [[Ichormoon Gauntlet]], [[Karn's Bastion]], [[Swan Song]], and [[Teferi's Protection]] also improve the deck's ability to advance and protect its board at casual power.

added.arcane sanctum: [[Arcane Sanctum]] gives reliable three-color fixing for a four-color commander deck.

results.summary: Transformed: Curve tightening. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.78.
results.why: This pass lowers the deck’s average mana value by replacing expensive draw, planeswalkers, and slower ramp with cheaper interaction, two-mana acceleration, and efficient proliferate tools. The mana base also shifts from excess basics and slow fixing into stronger multicolor lands to support [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] more smoothly. Overall, the changes keep the deck casual while making early turns more consistent and reducing clunky top-end draws.

added.deadly dispute: [[Deadly Dispute]] turns disposable creatures or tokens into efficient cards and mana.
added.demonic tutor: [[Demonic Tutor]] finds the exact engine, payoff, or answer you need at low cost.
added.diabolic intent: [[Diabolic Intent]] is especially efficient here because sacrificing a creature supports the deck's game plan.
added.enlightened tutor: [[Enlightened Tutor]] cheaply finds key enchantments or artifacts that support the aristocrats shell.
added.living death: [[Living Death]] can swing the game by reusing your death triggers while rebuilding your board.
added.lurrus of the dream-den: [[Lurrus of the Dream-Den]] helps recur many of the deck's cheap permanents for steady value.
added.martial coup: [[Martial Coup]] doubles as a board wipe and a token rebuild tool.
added.priest of forgotten gods: [[Priest of Forgotten Gods]] converts expendable creatures into mana, cards, and pressure on opponents.
added.selfless spirit: [[Selfless Spirit]] protects your board while also being a useful sacrifice piece.
added.smothering tithe: [[Smothering Tithe]] gives the deck strong mana acceleration to deploy multiple pieces faster.
added.village rites: [[Village Rites]] is a cheap way to cash in a creature for immediate card draw.

removed.swamp: Extra [[Swamp]] copies were cut to reduce flooding after lowering the curve and adding more cheap value.
removed.plains: Extra [[Plains]] copies were cut to open room for higher-impact spells.
removed.corpse knight: [[Corpse Knight]] leans more on creature entry than on the deck's primary death-focused synergies.
removed.dark confidant: [[Dark Confidant]] is efficient but less reliable here than sacrifice-based draw options.
removed.divine visitation: [[Divine Visitation]] is powerful but slower and less necessary than cheaper engine pieces.
removed.emeria shepherd: [[Emeria Shepherd]] is expensive and asks for a slower game than this pass wants.
removed.farewell: [[Farewell]] is very strong but can exile your own graveyard and synergies along with opponents' boards.
removed.high market: [[High Market]] was trimmed as part of the mana base cleanup for more impactful nonland slots.
removed.merciless eviction: [[Merciless Eviction]] is flexible but relatively slow and can disrupt your own board plan.
removed.painful truths: [[Painful Truths]] was replaced by cheaper draw that better uses sacrifice fodder.
removed.phyrexian tower: [[Phyrexian Tower]] was removed to address the deck's color identity issue noted in validation.
removed.read the bones: [[Read the Bones]] is solid card draw but less efficient than the new sacrifice-draw upgrades.
removed.spawning pit: [[Spawning Pit]] is a slower outlet than the stronger payoffs and card flow added here.
removed.spectator seating: [[Spectator Seating]] was removed to help tighten the mana base within [[Teysa Karlov]]'s color identity.
removed.sram's expertise: [[Sram's Expertise]] is acceptable token production but less impactful than the upgraded options.
removed.utter end: [[Utter End]] was cut for efficiency since the pass prioritized proactive engines and tutors.
